description_long: This bus shelter setup features a simple wooden bench with metal supports, positioned on a tiled ground surface marked with a red grid. Adjacent to the bench is a green metal trash bin, and a baby stroller is parked nearby, suggesting a family-friendly environment. A tall, weathered metal pole supports a blue and white bus stop sign, indicating the location's function as a public transportation waiting area. The shelter lacks a roof or side panels, offering no protection from the elements. The overall arrangement is open and accessible, with clear sightlines and space for pedestrian movement. The materials and design evoke a utilitarian, urban streetscape.
description: An open bus stop area with a wooden bench, trash bin, stroller, and a bus stop sign on a metal pole, all set on a tiled grid surface.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bench from above and the side, with the trash bin, stroller, and the bus stop sign pole clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view of the bench, with the trash bin to the right and the stroller in front, emphasizing the seating area.
description_view_2: View 2 highlights the side of the trash bin and the end of the bench, with the stroller and sign pole in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back of the bench, the rear of the trash bin, and the back of the bus stop sign, with the stroller partially visible.
